items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 7 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「蚂蚁携手20余家伙伴共建ASL生态,推动智能体可信互联」、「让智能体拥有原生语言,蚂蚁密算WAIC发布HOP 3.0」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
actionItems: 评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：蚂蚁携手20余家伙伴共建ASL生态,推动智能体可信互联
评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：让智能体拥有原生语言,蚂蚁密算WAIC发布HOP 3.0
评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：腾讯发布多款具身智能基座模型与智能体,钛螺丝平台迎来全面升级

跟进：DataFlow-Harness: A Grounded Code-Agent Platform for Constructing Editable LLM Data Pipelines

items.title: 蚂蚁携手20余家伙伴共建ASL生态,推动智能体可信互联
items.summary: 蚂蚁在Agent引擎中引入原生安全和"换挡式"编排调度机制,通过分布式运行底座兼顾执行效率、推理能力与运行成本,并将安全能...
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: 腾讯发布多款具身智能基座模型与智能体,钛螺丝平台迎来全面升级
items.summary: 7月18日,腾讯Robotics X实验室、福田实验室联合腾讯混元发布具身智能系列新模型和智能体新成果,首次系统性地打通"感知—身...
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: CLOSER-Bench: Evaluating Budgeted Cross-Stage Design Closure for Hardware Agents
items.summary: Hardware engineering exposes coding agents to a form of long-horizon work that is difficult to capture with pass-at-k: progress is continuous, tool feedback is delayed and heterogeneous, and a backend failure may require revising RTL rather than tuning another physical-design pa…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: DataFlow-Harness: A Grounded Code-Agent Platform for Constructing Editable LLM Data Pipelines
items.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to automate data-processing workflows, yet coding agents typically produce scripts that are not automatically materialized as persistent, editable platform artifacts. We call this disconnect the \textit{NL2Pipeline gap}. To brid…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。
